case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. CESAR A. VALLECILLO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT VALLECILLO, CESAR A. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-30-2014
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR NOV-18-2014 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-18-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
